name: blackbox_module_with_attribute
description: Code should include a module marked with (* blackbox *) attribute to indicate it has no internal implementation

name: module_instantiation_with_named_ports
description: Code should include module instantiation using named port connections

name: hierarchy_top_module_selection
description: Code should include hierarchy command with -top flag to set the top module for synthesis

name: cutpoint_whole_module_optimization
description: Code should include a cutpoint command on a whole module which should trigger whole-module optimization removing all contents
